{E8464E14-D126-4B86-AFFB-295B0D3506F4}.target_type: Lakehouse Federation connection (or JDBC + Databricks secret scope)
{E8464E14-D126-4B86-AFFB-295B0D3506F4}.rationale: Source OLTP system remains external; credentials must never be hardcoded in notebooks — use a Databricks secret scope referenced from a Unity Catalog connection (Lakehouse Federation) or directly in the Spark JDBC read options.

{7C3E3ECC-C5AD-4675-9618-FC08465F8BC9}.rationale: The destination DW becomes the Databricks workspace itself — writes go directly to Delta tables in the wwi_<env> catalog via Spark/Databricks SQL, replacing the OLE DB destination connection entirely.

variables.target: ops.etl_watermark Delta table column (read/written by the orchestration task, not a job parameter — must persist across runs)
Computed value inside the MERGE task (MAX(lineage_key)+1 or IDENTITY column) — not passed as a parameter
Workflow job parameter `entity_name`, templated into each per-entity job run
ops.etl_watermark Delta table column (read/written by the orchestration task, not a job parameter — must persist across runs)
